extraction.one_line_summary: VACHEK Matthias (19yo) won from breakaway with Gazprom's 3-man numerical advantage after peloton mistimed chase, gap still 1:22 at 11km.
tactical_patterns: Gazprom committed three riders to breakaway including points jersey Strakov, using numerical advantage to control finale dynamics.
Peloton misjudged chase timing: gap under 1min at 35km, teams relaxed, allowing it to balloon back to 1:22 with 11km remaining.
Breakaway exploit: moderate 27°C temps and urban wind protection at Dubai Expo reduced peloton's aerodynamic advantage in chase.

rider_signals.VACHEK Matthias: positive: 19yo won senior debut stage despite Gazprom's 3-man numerical advantage, showing superior finishing power over experienced breakaway companions
rider_signals.STRAKOV Dimitri: neutral: sacrificed stage win ambitions to secure points jersey, Gazprom team tactics prioritizing classification over stage hunting
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: negative: led bunch sprint but team failed to organize timely chase despite sprint-friendly flat parcours
